---
title: "test_check_pro_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_check_pro_empire.py"
loc: 40
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.85
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 5.40
overall_score: 4.60
---

## Intent
The `test_check_pro_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on MockGoogleAPIError, test_script_checks_model_availability, test_script_exits_when_no_api_key. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MockGoogleAPIError, test_script_checks_model_availability, test_script_exits_when_no_api_key. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.tools.debug](file://src.tools.debug)

### Exports
- `MockGoogleAPIError`
- `test_script_checks_model_availability`
- `test_script_exits_when_no_api_key`
